## STN_COSIS.OEHR_COUNTRIES oehr_country table. Contains 25 rows. References with oehr_locations table.
- COUNTRY_ID CHAR Primary key of oehr_countries table.
- COUNTRY_NAME VARCHAR2 oehr_Country name
- REGION_ID NUMBER Region ID for the country. Foreign key to region_id column in the oehr_departments table.
- FK: REGION_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_REGIONS(REGION_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_CUSTOMERS Contains customers data either entered by an employee or by the customer him/herself over the Web.
- CUSTOMER_ID NUMBER Primary key column.
- CUST_FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2 NOT NULL constraint.
- CUST_LAST_NAME VARCHAR2 NOT NULL constraint.
- CUST_ADDRESS OEHR_CUST_ADDRESS_TYP Object column of type address_typ.
- PHONE_NUMBERS OEHR_PHONE_LIST_TYP Varray column of type phone_list_typ.
- NLS_LANGUAGE VARCHAR2
- NLS_TERRITORY VARCHAR2
- CREDIT_LIMIT NUMBER Check constraint.
- CUST_EMAIL VARCHAR2
- ACCOUNT_MGR_ID NUMBER References oehr_employees.employee_id.
- CUST_GEO_LOCATION SDO_GEOMETRY SDO (spatial) column.
- FK: ACCOUNT_MGR_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_DEPARTMENTS Departments table that shows details of departments where employees work. Contains 27 rows; references with oehr_locations, oehr_employees, and oehr_job_history tables.
- DEPARTMENT_ID NUMBER Primary key column of oehr_departments table.
- DEPARTMENT_NAME VARCHAR2 A not null column that shows name of a department. Administration, Marketing, Purchasing, Human Resources, Shipping, IT, Executive, Public Relations, Sales, Finance, and Accounting.
- MANAGER_ID NUMBER Manager_id of a department. Foreign key to employee_id column of oehr_employees table. The manager_id column of the oehr_employee table references this column.
- LOCATION_ID NUMBER Location id where a department is located. Foreign key to location_id column of oehr_locations table.
- FK: MANAGER_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
- FK: LOCATION_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_LOCATIONS(LOCATION_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES oehr_employees table. Contains 107 rows. References with oehr_departments, oehr_jobs, oehr_job_history tables. Contains a self reference.
- EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER Primary key of oehr_employees table.
- FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2 First name of the employee. A not null column.
- LAST_NAME VARCHAR2 Last name of the employee. A not null column.
- EMAIL VARCHAR2 Email id of the employee
- PHONE_NUMBER VARCHAR2 Phone number of the employee; includes country code and area code
- HIRE_DATE DATE Date when the employee started on this job. A not null column.
- JOB_ID VARCHAR2 Current job of the employee; foreign key to job_id column of the oehr_jobs table. A not null column.
- SALARY NUMBER Monthly salary of the employee. Must be greater than zero (enforced by constraint oehr_emp_salary_min)
- COMMISSION_PCT NUMBER Commission percentage of the employee; Only employees in sales department elgible for commission percentage
- MANAGER_ID NUMBER Manager id of the employee; has same domain as manager_id in oehr_departments table. Foreign key to employee_id column of oehr_employees table. (useful for reflexive joins and CONNECT BY query)
- DEPARTMENT_ID NUMBER Department id where employee works; foreign key to department_id column of the oehr_departments table
- FK: DEPARTMENT_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_DEPARTMENTS(DEPARTMENT_ID)
- FK: MANAGER_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
- FK: JOB_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_JOBS(JOB_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_INVENTORIES Tracks availability of products by product_it and warehouse_id.
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER Part of concatenated primary key, references oehr_product_information.product_id.
- WAREHOUSE_ID NUMBER Part of concatenated primary key, references oehr_warehouses.warehouse_id.
- QUANTITY_ON_HAND NUMBER
- FK: PRODUCT_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_PRODUCT_INFORMATION(PRODUCT_ID)
- FK: WAREHOUSE_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_WAREHOUSES(WAREHOUSE_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_JOB_HISTORY Table that stores job history of the employees. If an employee changes departments within the job or changes jobs within the department, new rows get inserted into this table with old job information of the employee. Contains a complex primary key: employee_id+start_date. Contains 25 rows. References with oehr_jobs, oehr_employees, and oehr_departments tables.
- EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER A not null column in the complex primary key employee_id+start_date. Foreign key to employee_id column of the oehr_employee table
- START_DATE DATE A not null column in the complex primary key employee_id+start_date. Must be less than the end_date of the oehr_job_history table. (enforced by constraint oehr_jhist_date_interval)
- END_DATE DATE Last day of the employee in this job role. A not null column. Must be greater than the start_date of the oehr_job_history table. (enforced by constraint oehr_jhist_date_interval)
- JOB_ID VARCHAR2 Job role in which the employee worked in the past; foreign key to job_id column in the oehr_jobs table. A not null column.
- DEPARTMENT_ID NUMBER Department id in which the employee worked in the past; foreign key to deparment_id column in the oehr_departments table
- FK: DEPARTMENT_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_DEPARTMENTS(DEPARTMENT_ID)
- FK: EMPLOYEE_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
- FK: JOB_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_JOBS(JOB_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_JOBS jobs table with job titles and salary ranges. Contains 19 rows. References with oehr_employees and oehr_job_history table.
- JOB_ID VARCHAR2 Primary key of jobs oehr_table.
- JOB_TITLE VARCHAR2 A not null column that shows job title, e.g. AD_VP, FI_ACCOUNTANT
- MIN_SALARY NUMBER Minimum salary for a job title.
- MAX_SALARY NUMBER Maximum salary for a job title
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_LOCATIONS Locations table that contains specific address of a specific office, warehouse, and/or production site of a company. Does not store addresses / locations of customers. Contains 23 rows; references with the oehr_departments and oehr_countries tables.
- LOCATION_ID NUMBER Primary key of oehr_locations table
- STREET_ADDRESS VARCHAR2 Street address of an office, warehouse, or production site of a company. Contains building number and street name
- POSTAL_CODE VARCHAR2 Postal code of the location of an office, warehouse, or production site of a company.
- CITY VARCHAR2 A not null column that shows city where an office, warehouse, or production site of a company is located.
- STATE_PROVINCE VARCHAR2 State or Province where an office, warehouse, or production site of a company is located.
- COUNTRY_ID CHAR Country where an office, warehouse, or production site of a company is located. Foreign key to country_id column of the oehr_countries table.
- FK: COUNTRY_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_COUNTRIES(COUNTRY_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_ORDER_ITEMS Example of many-to-many resolution.
- ORDER_ID NUMBER Part of concatenated primary key, references orders.order_id.
- LINE_ITEM_ID NUMBER Part of concatenated primary key.
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER References oehr_product_information.product_id.
- UNIT_PRICE NUMBER
- QUANTITY NUMBER
- ORDER_ITEM_ID NUMBER
- FK: ORDER_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_ORDERS(ORDER_ID)
- FK: PRODUCT_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_PRODUCT_INFORMATION(PRODUCT_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_ORDERS Contains orders entered by a salesperson as well as over the Web.
- ORDER_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY column.
- ORDER_DATE TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE column, NOT NULL constraint.
- ORDER_MODE VARCHAR2 CHECK constraint.
- CUSTOMER_ID NUMBER
- ORDER_STATUS NUMBER 0: Not fully entered, 1: Entered, 2: Canceled - bad credit, - 3: Canceled - by customer, 4: Shipped - whole order, - 5: Shipped - replacement items, 6: Shipped - backlog on items, - 7: Shipped - special delivery, 8: Shipped - billed, 9: Shipped - payment plan,- 10: Shipped - paid
- ORDER_TOTAL NUMBER CHECK constraint.
- SALES_REP_ID NUMBER References oehr_employees.employee_id.
- PROMOTION_ID NUMBER Sales promotion ID. Used in SH schema
- FK: CUSTOMER_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_CUSTOMERS(CUSTOMER_ID)
- FK: SALES_REP_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTIONS Non-industry-specific design, allows selection of NLS-setting-specific data derived at runtime, for example using the products view.
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER Primary key column.
- LANGUAGE_ID VARCHAR2 Primary key column.
- TRANSLATED_NAME NVARCHAR2
- TRANSLATED_DESCRIPTION NVARCHAR2
- FK: PRODUCT_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_PRODUCT_INFORMATION(PRODUCT_ID)
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_PRODUCT_INFORMATION Non-industry-specific data in various categories.
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER Primary key column.
- PRODUCT_NAME VARCHAR2
- PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 Primary language description corresponding to translated_description in oehr_product_descriptions, added to provide non-NLS text columns for OC views to access.
- CATEGORY_ID NUMBER Low cardinality column, can be used for bitmap index. Schema SH uses it as foreign key
- WEIGHT_CLASS NUMBER Low cardinality column, can be used for bitmap index.
- WARRANTY_PERIOD INTERVAL YEAR(2) TO MONTH INTERVAL YEAER TO MONTH column, low cardinality, can be used for bitmap index.
- SUPPLIER_ID NUMBER Offers possibility of extensions outside Common Schema.
- PRODUCT_STATUS VARCHAR2 Check constraint. Appropriate for complex rules, such as "All products in status PRODUCTION must have at least one inventory entry." Also appropriate for a trigger auditing status change.
- LIST_PRICE NUMBER
- MIN_PRICE NUMBER
- CATALOG_URL VARCHAR2
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_PROMOTIONS
- PROMO_ID NUMBER
- PROMO_NAME VARCHAR2
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_REGIONS Regions table that contains region numbers and names. Contains 4 rows; references with the oehr_Countries table.
- REGION_ID NUMBER Primary key of oehr_regions table.
- REGION_NAME VARCHAR2 Names of regions. Locations are in the countries of these regions.
## STN_COSIS.OEHR_WAREHOUSES Warehouse data unspecific to any industry.
- WAREHOUSE_ID NUMBER Primary key column.
- WAREHOUSE_SPEC XMLTYPE
- WAREHOUSE_NAME VARCHAR2
- LOCATION_ID NUMBER Primary key column, references oehr_locations.location_id.
- WH_GEO_LOCATION SDO_GEOMETRY SDO (spatial) column.
- FK: LOCATION_ID -> STN_COSIS.OEHR_LOCATIONS(LOCATION_ID)

## STN_COSIS.UT_EQ
- ID NUMBER
- OUTCOME_ID NUMBER
- DATA_TYPE NUMBER

- AGAINST_V VARCHAR2
- CHECK_D DATE
- AGAINST_D DATE
- CHECK_N NUMBER
- AGAINST_N NUMBER
- CHECK_B CHAR
- AGAINST_B CHAR
## STN_COSIS.UT_GRID
- PACKAGE VARCHAR2 This is the name of the package to be tested.
- PROGNAME VARCHAR2 This is the name of the subprogram to be tested.
- OVERLOAD NUMBER This is the version of the subprogram where overloaded versions exist. (You may have to look in the data dictionary to work this out).
- TCNAME VARCHAR2 The name of the test case.
- MESSAGE VARCHAR2 The message to be used in the assertion code.
- ARGLIST VARCHAR2 The list of arguments to be passed to the subprogram.
- RETURN_VALUE VARCHAR2 The return value to be checked against.
- ASSERTION_TYPE VARCHAR2 The type of assertion to be used. Currently this is ignored unless it contains 'EQ' of 'ISNULL'.
- OWNER VARCHAR2

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_ACCESS_LEVELS
- ID NUMBER
- ACCESS_LEVEL VARCHAR2
- ROW_VERSION NUMBER
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_CATEGORY Stores the Category information, which is used to Categorize the Bug
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- CATEGORY_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique value which identifies the Category. example: Database Issue
- PARENT_ID NUMBER Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_CATEGORY.ID
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 A brief description about the Category.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the Category is active or inactive values Y,N.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_CLICKS
- ID NUMBER
- BUG_ID NUMBER
- APP_USERNAME VARCHAR2
- VIEW_TIMESTAMP TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- APP_SESSION VARCHAR2
- FK: BUG_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_SW_DEFECTS(ID)

- FK: BUG_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_SW_DEFECTS(ID)
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_GROUP Stores information Group(s) under which the users are added
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- GROUP_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique value which identifies the Group. example: DEVELOPER
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the user is active or inactive values Y,N.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_NOTES

- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- BUG_ID NUMBER
- NOTE CLOB
- TAGS VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_NOTIFICATIONS

- DISPLAY_UNTIL TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE

- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2

- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_PRODUCT Used to Store the Product information, for which Bug is submitted.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- PRODUCT_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique name which identifies the Product
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 The brief description of the product.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the Category is active or inactive values Y,N.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated Date of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_SEVERITY
- ID NUMBER
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- SEQUENCE_NUMBER NUMBER
- SEVERITY_NAME VARCHAR2
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_STATUS Stores the Status Information, which is used in Bug entry.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- STATUS_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique value which identifies the Status. example: Fixed
- STATUS_CODE VARCHAR2
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 A brief description about the Status.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the Status is active or inactive values Y,N.
- IS_OPEN VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_SW_DEFECTS Stores the Bug data
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- BUG_NUMBER VARCHAR2
- SUBJECT VARCHAR2 A brief description about the bug. Example : Javascript error on default.aspx
- SUBMITTED_BY VARCHAR2
- SUBMITTED_BY_ID NUMBER The User who posted the Bug. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_USER.ID
- SUBMITTED_ON TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the Bug is posted.
- CATEGORY_ID NUMBER The Category under which the bug exists. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_CATEGORY.ID
- ASSIGNED_TO_ID NUMBER The User to whom the Bug is assigned, lookup field value from eba_bt_USER.ID
- ASSIGNED_ON TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the Bug is assigned to a User/Group.
- DATE_CLOSED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- DESCRIPTION CLOB The Summary of the problem
- OS_NAME VARCHAR2 The Operating System in which the bug was found, if it is Operating System Specific
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER The Product in which the Bug exists. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_PRODUCT.ID
- FOUND_VERSION_ID NUMBER The Version in which the Bug exists. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_VERSION.ID
- STATUS_ID NUMBER The Status of the Bug. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_STATUS.ID
- SEVERITY_ID NUMBER
- URGENCY_ID NUMBER The Priority of the Bug. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_URGENCY.ID
- ASSIGNED_TO_GROUP_ID NUMBER The Group to which the Bug is Assigned to. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_GROUP.ID
- FIXED_VERSION_ID NUMBER The Version in which the Bug is Fixed. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_VERSION.ID
- FIX_BY_VERSION_ID NUMBER The Version in which the Bug need to be Fixed. Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_VERSION.ID
- SPREADSHEET_UPLOAD_DATE TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE
- COMPONENT VARCHAR2
- OPERATING_SYSTEM VARCHAR2
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the Build is active or inactive values Y,N.
- FLEX_01 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_02 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_03 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_04 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_05 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_06 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_07 VARCHAR2
- FLEX_08 VARCHAR2
- TAGS VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- FK: SUBMITTED_BY_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_USER(ID)
- FK: ASSIGNED_TO_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_USER(ID)
- FK: ASSIGNED_TO_GROUP_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_GROUP(ID)
- FK: URGENCY_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_URGENCY(ID)
- FK: SEVERITY_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_SEVERITY(ID)
- FK: STATUS_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_STATUS(ID)
- FK: CATEGORY_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_CATEGORY(ID)
- FK: PRODUCT_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_PRODUCT(ID)
- FK: FOUND_VERSION_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_VERSION(ID)
- FK: FIX_BY_VERSION_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_VERSION(ID)
- FK: FIXED_VERSION_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_VERSION(ID)

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_URGENCY
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- SEQUENCE_NUMBER NUMBER
- URGENCY_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique value which identifies the Priority. example: High
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 A brief description about the Priority.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2

- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_USER Stores information of the Authorized user's who can access Bug Tracker
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- LOGIN_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique value which identifies the User. example: ORAUSER01
- FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2 The person's first name.
- LAST_NAME VARCHAR2 The person's last name.
- EMAIL VARCHAR2 The person's primary email address.
- WORK_PHONE VARCHAR2 The person's work phone or extension.
- IS_ADMIN VARCHAR2 identifies whether the user has Administration rights, values Y,N.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the user is active or inactive values Y,N.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_USER_GROUP Link Table which stores the information about User and their Group(s).
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- USER_ID NUMBER Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_USER.ID
- GROUP_ID NUMBER Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_GROUP.ID
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- FK: USER_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_USER(ID)
- FK: GROUP_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_GROUP(ID)

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_VERSION Link Table which stores version information of Product.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- PRODUCT_ID NUMBER Foreign Key, lookup field value from eba_bt_PRODUCT.ID
- VERSION_NAME VARCHAR2 Unique name which identifies the Version under the Product
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 The brief description of the product.
- RELEASE_DATE TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the Version is released.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 identifies whether the Version is active or inactive values Y,N.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The local timestamp on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The last updated local timestamp of the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- FK: PRODUCT_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_BT_PRODUCT(ID)

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_CONTACTS Stores Contact information.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- CUSTOMER_ID NUMBER
- NAME VARCHAR2 The name of the Contact.
- TITLE VARCHAR2 The Title of the Contact.
- COMPANY VARCHAR2 The Company name of the Contact.
- ADDRESS_LINE1 VARCHAR2 Address of the Contact.
- ADDRESS_LINE2 VARCHAR2 Address of the Contact.
- CITY VARCHAR2 The name of the City.
- STATE VARCHAR2 The name of the State.
- COUNTRY VARCHAR2 The name of the Country.
- ZIP VARCHAR2 The Zip code.
- EMAIL VARCHAR2 The Email address.
- PHONE VARCHAR2 The Phone number.
- CELL_PHONE VARCHAR2 The Mobile phone number.
- FAX VARCHAR2 The Fax number.
- CONTACT_TYPE_ID NUMBER The type of Contact, the value is referred from ID field in eba_cust_contact_types.
- NOTES VARCHAR2 A short Note about the Contact.
- FACEBOOK VARCHAR2
- LINKEDIN VARCHAR2
- TWITTER VARCHAR2
- TAGS VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is last updated, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- CONTACT_FLEX_N01 NUMBER Custom number field
- CONTACT_FLEX_N02 NUMBER Custom number field
- CONTACT_FLEX_N03 NUMBER Custom number field
- CONTACT_FLEX_N04 NUMBER Custom number field
- CONTACT_FLEX_D01 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CONTACT_FLEX_D02 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CONTACT_FLEX_D03 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CONTACT_FLEX_D04 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CONTACT_FLEX_01 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_02 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_03 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_04 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_05 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_06 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_07 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_08 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CONTACT_FLEX_CLOB CLOB Custom field
- FK: CONTACT_TYPE_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_CONTACT_TYPES(ID)
- FK: CUSTOMER_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_CUSTOMERS(ID)

- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER

- CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR2 The name for the Customer.
- CUSTOMER_NAME_UPPER VARCHAR2
- INDUSTRY_ID NUMBER
- CATEGORY_ID NUMBER The Category in which the customer belongs.
- STATUS_ID NUMBER The Status of the Customer.
- GEOGRAPHY_ID NUMBER
- DEFAULT_TIMEZONE VARCHAR2
- REFERENCABLE VARCHAR2 Is the Customer referencable.
- MARQUEE_CUSTOMER_YN VARCHAR2
- TAGS VARCHAR2
- CUSTOMER_PRODUCTS VARCHAR2
- NUMBER_OF_USERS VARCHAR2 The number of users for your Customer.
- SUMMARY VARCHAR2 Short summary about the Customer.
- CUSTOMER_PROFILE CLOB
- APPLICATIONS CLOB
- WEB_SITE VARCHAR2 The URL of the Customer's Web site.
- LINKEDIN VARCHAR2
- FACEBOOK VARCHAR2
- TWITTER VARCHAR2
- STOCK_SYMBOL VARCHAR2 The Stock symbol of the Customer.
- SIC VARCHAR2 The Standard Industry Code of the Customer.
- DUNS VARCHAR2 Unique nine-digit identification sequence of Customer's Business..
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is last updated, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_N01 NUMBER Custom number field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_N02 NUMBER Custom number field

- CUSTOMER_FLEX_N04 NUMBER Custom number field

- CUSTOMER_FLEX_D02 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_D03 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_D04 TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE Custom date field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_01 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_02 VARCHAR2 Custom text field
- CUSTOMER_FLEX_03 VARCHAR2 Custom text field

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_LINKS Stores various Links pointing to the Contacts.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- CUSTOMER_ID NUMBER The ID of the Customer, the value is referred from ID field in eba_cust_customers.
- CONTACT_ID NUMBER The ID of the Contact, the value is referred from ID field in eba_cust_contacts.
- LINK VARCHAR2 The link which points to the additional data.
- LINK_DESC VARCHAR2
- LINK_TYPE VARCHAR2 The type of link.
- LINK_COMMENTS VARCHAR2
- TAGS VARCHAR2
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is last updated, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.
- FK: CUSTOMER_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_CUSTOMERS(ID)
- FK: CONTACT_ID -> STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_CONTACTS(ID)

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_NOTIFICATIONS

## STN_CURSO1.EBA_CUST_STATUS Stores Status information.
- ID NUMBER Primary Key, never changes. Automatically generated by Oracle Database
- ROW_VERSION_NUMBER NUMBER
- STATUS VARCHAR2 The unique name for the Status.
- DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2 A brief description about the Status.
- IS_ACTIVE VARCHAR2 Used to Enable or Disable a Customer Status from being used in the transaction.
- CREATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is created, automatically updated.
- CREATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who created the record, automatically updated.
- UPDATED TIMESTAMP(6) WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE The date on which the record is last updated, automatically updated.
- UPDATED_BY VARCHAR2 The user who last updated the record, automatically updated.

# UT3
## UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_DATA Accumulated data from all profiler runs
- RUNID NUMBER
- UNIT_NUMBER NUMBER
- LINE# NUMBER
- TOTAL_OCCUR NUMBER
- TOTAL_TIME NUMBER
- MIN_TIME NUMBER
- MAX_TIME NUMBER
- SPARE1 NUMBER
- SPARE2 NUMBER
- SPARE3 NUMBER
- SPARE4 NUMBER
- FK: RUNID -> UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_UNITS(RUNID)
- FK: UNIT_NUMBER -> UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_UNITS(UNIT_NUMBER)
## UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_RUNS Run-specific information for the PL/SQL profiler
- RUNID NUMBER
- RELATED_RUN NUMBER
- RUN_OWNER VARCHAR2
- RUN_DATE DATE
- RUN_COMMENT VARCHAR2
- RUN_TOTAL_TIME NUMBER
- RUN_SYSTEM_INFO VARCHAR2
- RUN_COMMENT1 VARCHAR2
- SPARE1 VARCHAR2
## UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_UNITS Information about each library unit in a run
- RUNID NUMBER
- UNIT_NUMBER NUMBER
- UNIT_TYPE VARCHAR2
- UNIT_OWNER VARCHAR2
- UNIT_NAME VARCHAR2
- UNIT_TIMESTAMP DATE
- TOTAL_TIME NUMBER
- SPARE1 NUMBER
- SPARE2 NUMBER
- FK: RUNID -> UT3.PLSQL_PROFILER_RUNS(RUNID)
